<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="apps/app/src/pack/examples/sv-helm/sv-values.yaml" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-literal-marker-apps-app-src-pack-examples-sv-helm-sv-values-docs-pruning-start" location="stringMarker:DOCS_PRUNING_START-&gt;DOCS_PRUNING_END" -->
```yaml
  synchronizers:
    current:
      sequencerPruningConfig:
        # Enable or disable sequencer pruning
        enabled: true
        # The pruning interval is the time between two consecutive prunings.
        pruningInterval: "1 hour"
        # The retention period is the time for which the sequencer will retain the data.
        retentionPeriod: "30 days"
```
